name: Twilio - Api
description: Twilio - Api provides a REST API for programmatic access to its features. Use it to automate workflows and integrate with other services.

capabilities.name: api20100401account
capabilities.description: Manage api20100401account — create a new twilio subaccount from the account making the request, modify the properties of a given account, retrieves a collection of accounts belonging to the account used to make the request. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: api20100401address
capabilities.description: Manage api20100401address resources. Create, read, update, and delete operations are available.

capabilities.name: api20100401application
capabilities.description: Manage api20100401application — create a new application within your account, updates the application's properties, retrieve a list of applications representing an application within the requesting account. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: api20100401authorized_connect_app
capabilities.description: Manage api20100401authorized connect app — retrieve a list of authorized-connect-apps belonging to the account used to make the request, fetch an instance of an authorized-connect-app. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: api20100401available_phone_number_country
capabilities.description: Manage api20100401available phone number country resources. Create, read, update, and delete operations are available.

capabilities.name: api20100401local
capabilities.description: Manage api20100401local resources. Create, read, update, and delete operations are available.

capabilities.name: api20100401machine_to_machine
capabilities.description: Manage api20100401machine to machine resources. Create, read, update, and delete operations are available.

capabilities.name: api20100401mobile
capabilities.description: Manage api20100401mobile resources. Create, read, update, and delete operations are available.

capabilities.name: api20100401national
capabilities.description: Manage api20100401national resources. Create, read, update, and delete operations are available.

capabilities.name: api20100401shared_cost
capabilities.description: Manage api20100401shared cost resources. Create, read, update, and delete operations are available.

capabilities.name: api20100401toll_free
capabilities.description: Manage api20100401toll free resources. Create, read, update, and delete operations are available.

capabilities.name: api20100401voip
capabilities.description: Manage api20100401voip resources. Create, read, update, and delete operations are available.
